author: jtraglia
content: Hey <@106441459183423488> regarding your PR to update Gloas specs, in general things look good. But I would prefer we wait to merge this until we make Gloas gossip validation specs executable, see [this issue](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/issues/4611). I believe it would make these checks a lot easier to understand. Does this seem reasonable to you? There is no rush, right?

author: jtraglia
content: I am hoping to have Gloas gossip specs updated within a few weeks. Currently at Deneb.

author: marcopolo__
content:
I agree I would like executable specs, but why block the merge? This is defining what the existing fulu feature looks like in gloas. And matches the existing full data column changes. 

I’m happy the help get the validation rules updated as an executable later.

There is some urgency in that I’d like to have this implemented during interop next week.

author: marcopolo__
content: <@592004585506340885> (sorry didn’t reply to the message properly)

author: jtraglia
content: I see. Hmm. Okay let's get this merged soon then.
